title: guettarda cobrensis
intro: Guettarda cobrensis, a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is also known as "Mango Tree" or "Guettarda", but it's worth noting that this is not the same tree as the one that produces mango fruits. The Guettarda cobrensis plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, that are believed to provide health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting skin health.
